16.reason: [Error: This scanf reads two integers, but the input format only provides one integer after '1'. It should be scanf("%d",&a); and then op should be read in the next loop iteration.]

20.reason: [Error: This scanf reads an integer for op, but for pop operations (op == 0), there is no following integer in the input. This will cause incorrect reading of subsequent operations.]
